titleStmt.title: SII 38.496: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 496. (A.R. No. 496 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravattin Rājarāja III Year: 18th siṁha śu 3, Wednesday, Attam = 10th August 1233 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged at the end and records that a wet land (namśey) called saṉaṉāthan, of six mā in extent was sold to a certain Śrutimān Śōran Sēṉanḍaṉ alias Ilaṅkēśuradēvar of Neṟkuḷam in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Śrutimān Rāmanchōḻaṉ of the same village (Neṟkuḷam) for three thousand five hundred kāśu. It is also mentioned that the seller, Rāmaṉchōḻaṉ bought this land from a certain Piḷḷai Brahmādarāya Muttaraiyar and owned it before selling it.

Kuṟuchchi-uḍaiyāṉ kaṇakku Chōḻamādēvi-uḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Siṅgapperumāḷ, Sandan Veṇban alias Rājarājachchāriyan, Dēśan Tāḻi, an artisan of Neṟkuḷam and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8vatu simhanāyyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattuRead pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum putaṉ kiḻamai(y)yum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ vaṭa karai Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu neṟkuḷamuṭai
ya curutimāṉ coraṉ ceṉaṇṭaṉāṉa Ilaṅkecuratevarkku meṟpaṭiyūril curutimānkala Irāmancoḻaneṉ nilavilaippirāmaṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu neṟkuḷattu Ūrkuḷattu naṉceyyil nāṉ piḷḷai pirama
tarāyamuttaraiyar pakkal vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiyeṉāy Eṉṉutāy nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa caṉaṉātaneṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai paṟaccerik kiṇaṟṟu niṉṟum teṟku nokkip pokiṟa peruvarampuk
ku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai paṇikkan kuṇṭukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vaṉṉicceyikkum cemmāna cekkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āka Icainta perunānkel
lai naṭuvu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam pa� Innilam Āṟu māvum Iṟṟai nāḷil viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāna Emmi navilaipporuḷ ṉṟāṭu naṟ Irā Ikkācu muvāyirattaññūṟum Āvaṇak kaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi
ṟṟik kaic celavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutten coṟancoṇṭaṉāna Ilaṅkecuratevarku Irāman coḻaneṉ Innilam Āṟu māvukkum Ikkācu muvvāyirataññūṟume vilai
yāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcela Olaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celaolai kāṭṭak kaṭa[va*ta]llātārākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇ
ṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutten coṟan coṇṭaṉāṉa Ilaṅkecuratevaṟku Irāmancoḻanen Itu Irāma coḻaṉ cayitāṉataṉmaikku Ivai kuṟucciuṭaiyāṉ kaṇakku coḻamātevi U
ṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalauṭaiyān ciṅkapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāmaṉ pāppan cayiñāṉatanmaikku Ivvūr m vāḷayar maṇmar Aḻakiyanāyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivāman Iḷañciṅka
ṉ cantan vempaṉāṉa Irācarācaācāriyaneḻuttu Itu kāman cuntarapāṇṭiya pallavaraiyan cayiñāṉa taṉmaikku Ippaṭi Aṟivukkum I neṟkuḷam kāṇiuṭaiya taccaṉ tecantāḻi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven kāttāṉ vi
caiyālaiyapiramaneḻuttu Ivar co tiṭṭeḻutta Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭu lamuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Ūṟaiyāṇṭān nāṟpatteṇṇā
neḻuttumivai
Digital edition of SII 38.496 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
